default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, feedback, and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Performance:** 16 blogs are live and driving immediate traffic (e.g., 7 sessions on a blog published Friday), validating the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [**PMM Feedback:** Content must shift from single-product focus to a "full stack" story (e.g., MDR, UEM) and maintain a direct, topic-focused structure.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility:** New articles are winning Google AI Overviews. GrowthX proposed listicles as a key tactic to capture more LLM real estate, citing competitor success.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [**Tooling:** N-able will get CheckVat access next week to track LLM performance and define the prompts that matter most for reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Feedback

  - [**Production:** 16 blogs are published, with 9 in Elaine's review queue and 3 undergoing GrowthX revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [**Performance:** All published blogs are generating sessions, validating the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [**PMM Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [**Product Positioning:** Shift from single-product focus to a "full stack" story.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
          - [**Example:** For "Security Resilience," promote the MDR solution, not just EDR. For "Endpoint Resilience," promote the UEM platform, not just Enable EDR.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [**Structure:** Maintain a direct, topic-focused structure.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
          - [**Example:** A reworked "Endpoint Automation Solutions" article was too fragmented, defining UEM and RMM instead of focusing on the core topic.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**MDR Topics:** New MDR topics are with Jen (PMM) for approval via Airtable. This is not a production blocker, as the team has 3 weeks of approved topics.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### Strategy: Listicles for LLM Visibility

  - [**Problem:** Competitors (e.g., Huntress) are using listicles to capture prime real estate in LLM responses (e.g., Perplexity, Google AI Overviews).](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [**Solution:** Publish N-able-authored listicles comparing platforms to influence LLM outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**Internal Concern:** N-able PMMs worry this tactic feels inauthentic or gives competitors "airtime."](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [**GrowthX Rationale:** This is a proven strategy for gaining LLM visibility, as demonstrated by other GrowthX clients (e.g., Tavern, Seat).](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** GrowthX will prepare 1–2 test listicle ideas to prove the concept after the current MDR topic batch is approved.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

### Tooling: CheckVat for LLM Tracking

  - [**Purpose:** Track N-able's visibility in LLM responses across key queries.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [**Current Wins:** New articles are already being cited in Google AI Overviews for prompts like "best ways to scale my MSP business."](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [**Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
      - [**Prompt Library:** Tracks performance against a shared library of high-value industry prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Historical Data:** Provides historical performance data, unlike many forward-only tools.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
      - [**Custom Prompts:** Allows tracking for specific keywords targeted by new content.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [**Competitor Tracking:** Monitors N-able's presence vs. key competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Tagging:** Categorizes prompts by persona, funnel stage, etc., for granular reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [**Access:** N-able will receive access next week.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [**Insight:** The tool confirms that top-cited sources in LLM responses are frequently listicle-style blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
      - [Update content artifacts to reflect the "full stack" product positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [Fix the typo in the AI-generated image ("access rented").](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
      - [Prepare 1–2 test listicle ideas for the next meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
      - [Grant N-able access to CheckVat next week.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [**Elaine:**](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [Follow up with Jen (PMM) on MDR topic approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/qCHSgzyQHYizyyEqCWds-Hur7GTUCEko?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

action_items.description: Schedule LLM visibility sidebar w/ Andrew, Elaine; invite Nick; decide next week's sync vs dedicated
Update content guidelines: full-stack positioning, topic-focused; apply to current drafts
Email Andrew meeting recording re: listicles
Email Elaine listicle case studies + 1–2 test ideas
Email Elaine re: next week's sync vs dedicated LLM visibility session
Fix 'access rented' typo in generated image
